title: Lead Instructional Designer at Allen Career Institute

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Allen Career Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Instructional Designer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
